text:
In the first scene, I am enveloped by the spacious, geometric clarity of a modern building. The clean lines and soft lighting create a sense of serenity, though the emptiness feels almost clinical—a space waiting for purpose or presence.

In the second scene, I am invigorated by the colorful vibrancy of an exhibition. The bold patterns and texts spark curiosity. Here, ideas seem to leap off the walls, inviting me to think and engage. I feel energized, aware of humanity’s relentless pursuit of knowledge and innovation.
